summary: Completed testing of Raw Surf OS P2 Remaining Features: Auto-escrow release scheduler, Photographer Availability Calendar APIs, Stripe Identity age verification, and Group discounts in booking price calculation. All 15 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-escrow release scheduler job registered with CronTrigger(hour=3, minute=0) - runs daily at 3am UTC
auto_release_escrow_task releases escrow 7 days after session if content not delivered
GET /api/photographer/{id}/bookings-calendar returns bookings array, 7 availability_windows (one per day), and blocked_dates list
POST /api/photographer/{id}/block-date and unblock-date work correctly with YYYY-MM-DD format
POST /api/grom-hq/create-age-verification/{parent_id} creates Stripe Identity session with client_secret and verification_session_id
Group discounts applied in booking creation: 5+ surfers uses group_discount_5_plus, 3+ uses group_discount_3_plus, 2+ uses group_discount_2_plus
PhotographerBookingsManager has Calendar tab with PhotographerAvailabilityCalendar component
ScheduledBookingDrawer shows group discount notice when photographer has discounts configured
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Remaining features fully tested: 1) Auto-escrow release scheduler job registered at 3am UTC daily - releases escrow 7 days after session if content not delivered, 2) Calendar API GET /api/photographer/{id}/bookings-calendar returns bookings, 7 availability_windows, and blocked_dates, 3) PUT /api/photographer/{id}/availability-windows saves weekly availability, 4) POST /api/photographer/{id}/block-date and unblock-date work correctly, 5) POST /api/grom-hq/create-age-verification/{parent_id} creates Stripe Identity session with client_secret and verification_session_id, 6) Group discounts applied in booking creation based on max_participants (5+, 3+, 2+ tiers), 7) PhotographerBookingsManager has Calendar tab with PhotographerAvailabilityCalendar, 8) ScheduledBookingDrawer shows group discount notice

auto_escrow_release_scheduler.logic: Releases escrow 7 days after session if content not delivered

availability_windows_update.payload: windows array with day, enabled, start, end

scheduled_booking_drawer_group_discount_.displays: Group Discounts Available notice when hasGroupDiscounts is true
